rationale: The cited 2008 paper appears only in a grouped literature-list citation describing prior work that integrates marketing and engineering for single-product design. The citing paper does not discuss that paper's specific model, measures, findings, or assumptions, and it does not attribute any key component of the proposed product-line optimization to it. Core methodological building blocks are linked to other sources that are explicitly developed in-text. Therefore this citation functions as background positioning rather than a meaningful directional dependency.
